metadata.significance: Mentions splitting of moon, stories of past nations and their destruction

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
ayahs.transliteration: Iqtarabati alssaAAatu wainshaqqa alqamaru

translations.en_sahih: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].
translations.en_yusufali: The Hour (of Judgment) is nigh, and the moon is cleft asunder.
translations.ms_basmeih: Telah hampir saat (kedatangan hari kiamat) dan terbelahlah bulan.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
ayahs.transliteration: Wain yaraw ayatan yuAAridoo wayaqooloo sihrun mustamirrun

translations.en_sahih: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic."
translations.en_yusufali: But if they see a Sign, they turn away, and say, "This is (but) transient magic."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kalau mereka (kaum musyrik Mekah) melihat sesuatu mukjizat, mereka berpaling ingkar sambil berkata: (Ini ialah) sihir yang terus menerus berlaku.

ayahs.arabic: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakaththaboo waittabaAAoo ahwaahum wakullu amrin mustaqirrun

translations.en_sahih: And they denied and followed their inclinations. But for every matter is a [time of] settlement.
translations.en_yusufali: They reject (the warning) and follow their (own) lusts but every matter has its appointed time.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (telah menjadi adat) mereka mendustakan (Nabi Muhammad dan mukjizat-mukjizat yang dibawanya) serta menurut hawa nafsu mereka, sedang tiap-tiap perkara tetap (menurut keadaan yang ditentukan oleh Allah).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad jaahum mina alanbai ma feehi muzdajarun

translations.en_sahih: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence -
translations.en_yusufali: There have already come to them Recitals wherein there is (enough) to check (them),
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sesungguhnya! Telah sampai kepada mereka (dengan perantaraan Al-Quran), sebahagian dari kisah-kisah dan berita (umat-umat yang telah lalu), yang mengandungi perkara-perkara yang cukup untuk mencegah mereka (dari perbuatan kufur itu).

ayahs.arabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahs.transliteration: Hikmatun balighatun fama tughnee alnnuthuru

translations.en_sahih: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].
translations.en_yusufali: Mature wisdom;- but (the preaching of) Warners profits them not.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Yang demikian ialah) pengajaran yang cukup sempurna; dalam pada itu, segala peringatan dan amaran tidak akan mendatangkan faedah (kepada mereka yang ingkar).

ayahs.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatawalla AAanhum yawma yadAAu alddaAAi ila shayin nukurin

translations.en_sahih: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore, (O Prophet,) turn away from them. The Day that the Caller will call (them) to a terrible affair,
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, berpalinglah dari mereka (wahai Muhammad dan janganlah dihiraukan). (Ingatlah) masa (malaikat) penyeru menyeru (mereka pada hari kiamat) kepada perkara yang tidak diingini (oleh orang yang bersalah);

ayahs.arabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
ayahs.transliteration: KhushshaAAan absaruhum yakhrujoona mina alajdathi kaannahum jaradun muntashirun

translations.en_sahih: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,
translations.en_yusufali: They will come forth,- their eyes humbled - from (their) graves, (torpid) like locusts scattered abroad,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Pada saat itu) masing-masing dengan keadaan menundukkan pandangannya kerana ketakutan keluar dari kubur seperti belalang yang terbang bertebaran.

ayahs.arabic: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
ayahs.transliteration: MuhtiAAeena ila alddaAAi yaqoolu alkafiroona hatha yawmun AAasirun

translations.en_sahih: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."
translations.en_yusufali: Hastening, with eyes transfixed, towards the Caller!- "Hard is this Day!", the Unbelievers will say.
translations.ms_basmeih: Masing-masing dengan cepatnya menuju kepada penyeru itu. (Pada saat yang demikian), orang-orang yang kafir berkata: Hari ini ialah hari yang amat sukar!

ayahs.arabic: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohin fakaththaboo AAabdana waqaloo majnoonun waizdujira

translations.en_sahih: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.
translations.en_yusufali: Before them the People of Noah rejected (their messenger): they rejected Our servant, and said, "Here is one possessed!", and he was driven out.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebelum mereka, kaum Nabi Nuh juga telah mendustakan (Rasulnya); iaitu mereka mendustakan hamba Kami (Nabi Nuh) serta mereka menuduhnya dengan berkata: Dia seorang gila dan dia telah diancam (dan dihalang daripada menjalankan dakwah agama).

ayahs.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
ayahs.transliteration: FadaAAa rabbahu annee maghloobun faintasir

translations.en_sahih: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."
translations.en_yusufali: Then he called on his Lord: "I am one overcome: do Thou then help (me)!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu dia berdoa merayu kepada Tuhannya dengan berkata: Sesungguhnya aku ini dikalahkan (oleh kaumku yang ingkar), oleh itu menangkanlah daku (terhadap mereka)!

ayahs.arabic: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fafatahna abwaba alssamai bimain munhamirin

translations.en_sahih: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down
translations.en_yusufali: So We opened the gates of heaven, with water pouring forth.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Kami bukakan pintu-pintu langit, dengan menurunkan hujan yang mencurah-curah.

ayahs.arabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafajjarna alarda AAuyoonan failtaqa almao AAala amrin qad qudira

translations.en_sahih: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.
translations.en_yusufali: And We caused the earth to gush forth with springs, so the waters met (and rose) to the extent decreed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami jadikan bumi memancarkan mata air-mata air (di sana sini), lalu bertemulah air (langit dan bumi) itu untuk (melakukan) satu perkara yang telah ditetapkan.

ayahs.arabic: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wahamalnahu AAala thati alwahin wadusurin

translations.en_sahih: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,
translations.en_yusufali: But We bore him on an (Ark) made of broad planks and caulked with palm-fibre:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami bawa naik Nabi Nuh (berserta pengikut-pengikutnya) di atas (bahtera yang dibina) dari keping-keping papan dan paku;

ayahs.arabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
ayahs.transliteration: Tajree biaAAyunina jazaan liman kana kufira

translations.en_sahih: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.
translations.en_yusufali: She floats under our eyes (and care): a recompense to one who had been rejected (with scorn)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang belayar laju dengan pemeliharaan dan pengawasan Kami; (Kami melakukan yang demikian dan menimpakan taufan itu) sebagai balasan bagi orang-orang yang kufur ingkar!

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad taraknaha ayatan fahal min muddakirin

translations.en_sahih: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?
translations.en_yusufali: And We have left this as a Sign (for all time): then is there any that will receive admonition?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah jadikan bahtera itu sebagai satu tanda yang menjadi pengajaran, maka adakah orang yang mahu beringat dan insaf?

ayahs.arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri

translations.en_sahih: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
translations.en_yusufali: But how (terrible) was My Penalty and My Warning?
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, perhatikanlah bagaimana buruknya azabKu dan kesan amaran-amaranKu.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin

translations.en_sahih: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
translations.en_yusufali: And We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember: then is there any that will receive admonition?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah mudahkan Al-Quran untuk menjadi peringatan dan pengajaran, maka adakah sesiapa yang mahu mengambil peringatan dan pelajaran (daripadanya)?

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat AAadun fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri

translations.en_sahih: 'Aad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
translations.en_yusufali: The 'Ad (people) (too) rejected (Truth): then how terrible was My Penalty and My Warning?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikian juga) kaum Aad telah mendustakan Rasulnya (lalu mereka dibinasakan); maka perhatikanlah, bagaimana buruknya azabku dan kesan amaran-amaranKu!

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna arsalna AAalayhim reehan sarsaran fee yawmi nahsin mustamirrin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,
translations.en_yusufali: For We sent against them a furious wind, on a Day of violent Disaster,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah menghantarkan kepada mereka angin ribut yang kencang, pada hari nahas yang berlanjutan; -

ayahs.arabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: TanziAAu alnnasa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin munqaAAirin

translations.en_sahih: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.
translations.en_yusufali: Plucking out men as if they were roots of palm-trees torn up (from the ground).
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang menumbangkan manusia gugur bergelimpangan, seolah-olah mereka batang-batang pohon kurma yang terbongkar.

ayahs.arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri

translations.en_sahih: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
translations.en_yusufali: Yea, how (terrible) was My Penalty and My Warning!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka perhatikanlah, bagaimana buruknya azabKu dan kesan amaran-amaranKu!

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin

translations.en_sahih: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
translations.en_yusufali: But We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember: then is there any that will receive admonition?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah mudahkan Al-Quran untuk peringatan dan pengajaran, maka adakah sesiapa yang mahu mengambil peringatan dan pelajaran (daripadanya)?

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat thamoodu bialnnuthuri

translations.en_sahih: Thamud denied the warning
translations.en_yusufali: The Thamud (also) rejected (their) Warners.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikian juga) kaum Thamud telah mendustakan peringatan dan amaran (yang disampaikan oleh Rasul mereka, Nabi Soleh).

ayahs.arabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqaloo abasharan minna wahidan nattabiAAuhu inna ithan lafee dalalin wasuAAurin

translations.en_sahih: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.
translations.en_yusufali: For they said: "What! a man! a Solitary one from among ourselves! shall we follow such a one? Truly should we then be straying in mind, and mad!
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu mereka berkata: Patutkah kita menurut manusia dari jenis kita, lagi yang berseorangan? Jika demikian, sesungguhnya kita berada dalam keadaan sesat dan gila!

ayahs.arabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Aolqiya alththikru AAalayhi min baynina bal huwa kaththabun ashirun

translations.en_sahih: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."
translations.en_yusufali: "Is it that the Message is sent to him, of all people amongst us? Nay, he is a liar, an insolent one!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidaklah patut wahyu peringatan itu diturunkan kepadanya (padahal orang-orang yang lebih layak ada) di antara kita. Bahkan dialah seorang pendusta, lagi sombong angkuh.

ayahs.arabic: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
ayahs.transliteration: SayaAAlamoona ghadan mani alkaththabu alashiru

translations.en_sahih: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.
translations.en_yusufali: Ah! they will know on the morrow, which is the liar, the insolent one!
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka akan mengetahui kelak siapakah orangnya yang pendusta, lagi sombong angkuh itu.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna mursiloo alnnaqati fitnatan lahum fairtaqibhum waistabir

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.
translations.en_yusufali: For We will send the she-camel by way of trial for them. So watch them, (O Salih), and possess thyself in patience!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami menghantarkan unta betina (yang menjadi mukjizat) sebagai satu ujian bagi mereka. Lalu (Kami perintahkan Rasul Kami): Tunggulah (apakah yang mereka akan lakukan) serta bersabarlah (terhadap tentangan mereka).

ayahs.arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wanabbihum anna almaa qismatun baynahum kullu shirbin muhtadarun

translations.en_sahih: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].
translations.en_yusufali: And tell them that the water is to be divided between them: Each one's right to drink being brought forward (by suitable turns).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan khabarkanlah kepada mereka, bahawa sesungguhnya air (telaga mereka) terbahagi di antara mereka dengan unta itu, tiap-tiap bahagian air itu dihadiri oleh yang berhak mengambilnya (pada hari gilirannya).

ayahs.arabic: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fanadaw sahibahum fataAAata faAAaqara

translations.en_sahih: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].
translations.en_yusufali: But they called to their companion, and he took a sword in hand, and hamstrung (her).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka selepas itu merasa bosan dengan keadaan unta itu dan berkira hendak membunuhnya), lalu mereka memanggil kawan mereka (yang sanggup membunuhnya), dia pun bertindak sampai dapat membunuhnya.

ayahs.arabic: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fakayfa kana AAathabee wanuthuri

translations.en_sahih: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.
translations.en_yusufali: Ah! how (terrible) was My Penalty and My Warning!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka perhatikanlah, bagaimana buruknya azabKu dan kesan amaran-amaranKu!

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna arsalna AAalayhim sayhatan wahidatan fakanoo kahasheemi almuhtathiri

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We sent upon them one blast from the sky, and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.
translations.en_yusufali: For We sent against them a single Mighty Blast, and they became like the dry stubble used by one who pens cattle.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami hantarkan kepada mereka satu pekikan (yang dahsyat), lalu menjadilah mereka (hancur) seperti ranting-ranting dan daun-daun yang pecah hancur, yang dikumpulkan oleh pemilik kandang binatang ternak.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin

translations.en_sahih: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
translations.en_yusufali: And We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember: then is there any that will receive admonition?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah mudahkan Al-Quran untuk peringatan dan pengajaran, maka adakah sesiapa yang mahu mengambil peringatan dan pelajaran (daripadanya)?

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththabat qawmu lootin bialnnuthuri

translations.en_sahih: The people of Lot denied the warning.
translations.en_yusufali: The people of Lut rejected (his) warning.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Demikian juga) kaum Nabi Lut telah mendustakan peringatan dan amaran (yang disampaikan oleh Rasulnya).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna arsalna AAalayhim hasiban illa ala lootin najjaynahum bisaharin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn
translations.en_yusufali: We sent against them a violent Tornado with showers of stones, (which destroyed them), except Lut's household: them We delivered by early Dawn,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah menghantarkan kepada mereka angin ribut yang menghujani mereka dengan batu, kecuali keluarga Nabi Lut, Kami selamatkan mereka (dengan menyuruh mereka keluar dari situ) pada waktu jauh malam,

ayahs.arabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
ayahs.transliteration: NiAAmatan min AAindina kathalika najzee man shakara

translations.en_sahih: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.
translations.en_yusufali: As a Grace from Us: thus do We reward those who give thanks.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebagai limpah kurnia dari Kami. Demikianlah kami membalas orang-orang yang bersyukur.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad antharahum batshatana fatamaraw bialnnuthuri

translations.en_sahih: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.
translations.en_yusufali: And (Lut) did warn them of Our Punishment, but they disputed about the Warning.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Nabi Lut telah memberi amaran kepada mereka mengenai azab seksa Kami; dalam pada itu, mereka tetap mendustakan amaran-amaran itu.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad rawadoohu AAan dayfihi fatamasna aAAyunahum fathooqoo AAathabee wanuthuri

translations.en_sahih: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."
translations.en_yusufali: And they even sought to snatch away his guests from him, but We blinded their eyes. (They heard:) "Now taste ye My Wrath and My Warning."
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Mereka telah memujuk Nabi Lut mengenai tetamunya, lalu Kami hapuskan biji mata mereka, serta (dikatakan kepada mereka): Rasalah azabKu dan kesan amaran-amaranKu!

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad sabbahahum bukratan AAathabun mustaqirrun

translations.en_sahih: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.
translations.en_yusufali: Early on the morrow an abiding Punishment seized them:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Mereka telah ditimpa azab yang kekal pada pagi-pagi hari (esoknya).

ayahs.arabic: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fathooqoo AAathabee wanuthuri

translations.en_sahih: So taste My punishment and warning.
translations.en_yusufali: "So taste ye My Wrath and My Warning."
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu (dikatakan kepada mereka): Rasalah azabKu dan kesan amaran-amaranKu!

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad yassarna alqurana lilththikri fahal min muddakirin

translations.en_sahih: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
translations.en_yusufali: And We have indeed made the Qur'an easy to understand and remember: then is there any that will receive admonition?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah mudahkan Al-Quran untuk peringatan dan pengajaran, maka adakah sesiapa yang mahu mengambil peringatan dan pelajaran (daripadanya)?

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad jaa ala firAAawna alnnuthuru

translations.en_sahih: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.
translations.en_yusufali: To the People of Pharaoh, too, aforetime, came Warners (from Allah).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Firaun dan kaumnya telah didatangi (Rasul-rasul) pemberi amaran.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaththaboo biayatina kulliha faakhathnahum akhtha AAazeezin muqtadirin

translations.en_sahih: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.
translations.en_yusufali: The (people) rejected all Our Signs; but We seized them with such Penalty (as comes) from One Exalted in Power, able to carry out His Will.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka telah mendustakan mukjizat-mukjizat Kami semuanya, lalu Kami timpakan azab seksa kepada mereka sebagai seksaan dari Yang Maha Perkasa, lagi Maha Kuasa.

ayahs.arabic: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Akuffarukum khayrun min olaikum am lakum baraatun fee alzzuburi

translations.en_sahih: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scripture?
translations.en_yusufali: Are your Unbelievers, (O Quraish), better than they? Or have ye an immunity in the Sacred Books?
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah orang-orang kafir kamu (wahai kaum musyrik Mekah), lebih baik (kekuatan, kekayaan dan kehandalannya) daripada kaum-kaum kafir yang tersebut itu? Atau adakah kamu mempunyai sebarang bukti dalam Kitab-kitab Suci tentang kebebasan kamu (dari azab)?

ayahs.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Am yaqooloona nahnu jameeAAun muntasirun

translations.en_sahih: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?
translations.en_yusufali: Or do they say: "We acting together can defend ourselves"?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka tidak mempunyai sebarang bukti) bahkan mereka akan berkata (dengan angkuhnya): Kami satu kaum yang bersatu, yang sudah tentu dapat membela diri!

ayahs.arabic: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
ayahs.transliteration: Sayuhzamu aljamAAu wayuwalloona alddubura

translations.en_sahih: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].
translations.en_yusufali: Soon will their multitude be put to flight, and they will show their backs.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kumpulan mereka yang bersatu itu tetap akan dikalahkan dan mereka pula akan berpaling lari.

ayahs.arabic: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
ayahs.transliteration: Bali alssaAAatu mawAAiduhum waalssaAAatu adha waamarru

translations.en_sahih: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, the Hour (of Judgment) is the time promised them (for their full recompense): And that Hour will be most grievous and most bitter.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Bukan kekalahan itu sahaja) bahkan hari kiamat ialah hari yang dijanjikan kepada mereka (untuk menerima balasan yang sepenuh-penuhnya) dan (azab seksa) hari kiamat itu amat dahsyat dan amat pahit.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna almujrimeena fee dalalin wasuAAurin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.
translations.en_yusufali: Truly those in sin are the ones straying in mind, and mad.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang berdosa berada dalam keadaan sesat (di dunia), dan (di akhirat pula mereka berada dalam) api Neraka.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yushaboona fee alnnari AAala wujoohihim thooqoo massa saqara

translations.en_sahih: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."
translations.en_yusufali: The Day they will be dragged through the Fire on their faces, (they will hear:) "Taste ye the touch of Hell!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Semasa mereka diseret di dalam Neraka (dengan tertiarap) atas muka mereka, (serta dikatakan kepada mereka): Rasalah kamu bakaran api Neraka.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna kulla shayin khalaqnahu biqadarin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, all things have We created in proportion and measure.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami menciptakan tiap-tiap sesuatu menurut takdir (yang telah ditentukan).

ayahs.arabic: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama amruna illa wahidatun kalamhin bialbasari

translations.en_sahih: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.
translations.en_yusufali: And Our Command is but a single (Act),- like the twinkling of an eye.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan hal Kami (dalam melaksanakan apa yang Kami kehendaki), hanyalah satu cara sahaja, (cepat jadinya) seperti sekelip mata.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad ahlakna ashyaAAakum fahal min muddakirin

translations.en_sahih: And We have already destroyed your kinds, so is there any who will remember?
translations.en_yusufali: And (oft) in the past, have We destroyed gangs like unto you: then is there any that will receive admonition?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah binasakan orang-orang yang sama keadaannya seperti kamu; maka adakah sesiapa yang mahu mengambil peringatan dan pelajaran?

ayahs.arabic: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakullu shayin faAAaloohu fee alzzuburi

translations.en_sahih: And everything they did is in written records.
translations.en_yusufali: All that they do is noted in (their) Books (of Deeds):
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiap-tiap perkara yang mereka lakukan, adalah tertulis di dalam Kitab suratan amal;

ayahs.arabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wakullu sagheerin wakabeerin mustatarun

translations.en_sahih: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.
translations.en_yusufali: Every matter, small and great, is on record.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiap-tiap perkara yang kecil dan yang besar tetap tercatit.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin wanaharin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,
translations.en_yusufali: As to the Righteous, they will be in the midst of Gardens and Rivers,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertakwa, di tempatkan dalam taman-taman Syurga (yang indah) dan (dekat) beberapa sungai,

ayahs.arabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Fee maqAAadi sidqin AAinda maleekin muqtadirin

translations.en_sahih: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
translations.en_yusufali: In an Assembly of Truth, in the Presence of a Sovereign Omnipotent.
translations.ms_basmeih: Di tempat yang sungguh bahagia, di sisi Tuhan Yang Menguasai segala-galanya, lagi Yang Berkuasa melakukan sekehendakNya.
